name: red-line-toolkit
description: The field guides from redlinedigital.dev — opinionated Claude Code pipelines for high-rigor refactors, module builds, page work, pre-ship audits, and session bookkeeping.

plugins.name: red-line-toolkit
plugins.description: 12 commands + 10 adversarial-critic agents + 1 skill: change-heavy, module-build/sprint, the page-design/code/implement pipeline, module-audit, mobile-audit, cleanup-light, cluster-fus, pre-commit-check, start/end-session, and the-adjudicator. Composes a lightweight anti-drift doc-method with a fleet of critics.
